title: Stunning overtime goal keeps Fossil Ridge soccer's repeat bid alive
Tunisia Sequences Ancient Durum Wheat Varieties to Boost Climate Resilience
description: Tunisian researchers sequenced the complete genomes of Mahmoudi and Chili durum wheat landraces, uncovering valuable traits for drought tolerance, disease resistance and climate resilience. The genomic data, available through OpenDurumGPT on Zenodo, supports global wheat breeding efforts while preserving Tunisia’s agricultural heritage, food security and centuries-old farming traditions amid growing climate change pressures worldwide. The post Tunisia Sequences Ancient Durum Wheat Varieties to Boost Climate Resilience appeared first on Seed World .
